hooks.command: auto-lint and format Python files after edits

echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; cmd=json.load(sys.stdin).get('command',''); (print('Blocked: use separate Bash calls for git commands — no && or ; chaining', file=sys.stderr), sys.exit(2)) if ('&&' in cmd or ';' in cmd) and 'git' in cmd else sys.exit(0)"
